subject: [PATCH v5 09/21] mm: swap: allocate a virtual swap slot for each swapped out page

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new virtual swap slot design, where each swapped out page is dynamically allocated a virtual slot and associated metadata structure. The virtual slot replaces the physical swap slot in page table entries and is used to index into swap data structures. The patch also repurposes the swap table infrastructure as a reverse map to look up the virtual swap slot from its associated physical swap slot on the swapfile. This change improves the management of swapped out pages and enables future optimizations such as simplified swapoff.
